title: SatIndustry
description: An industrial fabric mod inspired by mods like IndustrialCraft and etc.
body:
An industrial mod for fabric inspired by other mods like IndustrialCraft and etc. For those people who wants industrialization.

# WARNING
This mod is currently in early development so stuff are bound to break.

# Roadmap

- Industrial blocks such as Crucible and etc **WIP**
- Energy, fluid and item transport **WIP**

![Everything so far (early-testing2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26a655baa42afb72365e16c87d9e0074e0cd8dcd.png)
